title: goniophlebium areolatum
intro: Goniophlebium areolatum, also known as the forest fern or resurrection fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Goniophlebium areolatum lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and its antimicrobial properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Goniophlebium areolatum is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and its dried leaves can be used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and applications.
